title: my default pack
description: The default modpack that I use as a base for projects
body:
This is my personal default modpack and config setup — a solid kickstart point for new worlds and fresh installs. It includes a curated selection of performance optimizations (like Sodium) and quality-of-life improvements (such as better inventory management), all chosen to stay close to the vanilla feel while making the game smoother and more enjoyable.

Also bundled is a preconfigured options.txt for consistent settings across installs — perfect for quickly getting up and running without tweaking everything from scratch.

While it's built for my own use, it's open for anyone who wants a reliable, optimized base to build from.
